description: The Brothers Keepers is an organized crime group based in British Columbia, Canada, founded in 2016 by Gavinder Singh Grewal. The group is engaged in drug trafficking, murder, and other criminal activities across Canada and abroad, with ties to transnational organized crime. It is considered one of the most prominent and violent gangs in British Columbia by the RCMP. The group's membership primarily consists of former Red Scorpions members.

country_links.evidence_quote: its operators were likely involved in exportation to Pacific island nations such as Australia and New Zealand...
country_links.context: The gang's drug lab produced pills for export to Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: Founding Brothers Keepers member Harpreet Singh Majhu and Orosman Jr. Garcia-Arevalo... were hired to take out Iranian-born Turkish drug kingpin Cetin Koç in Dubai . On May 4, 2016, Majhu and Garcia-Arevalo ambushed Koç as he was sitting in a vehicle in downtown Dubai.
country_links.context: Brothers Keepers members carried out an assassination in Dubai.

country_links.evidence_quote: Mohammed spent almost three years in a Washington state prison after he pleaded guilty to armed robbery in April 2022...
country_links.context: A Brothers Keepers member was imprisoned in Washington state for armed robbery.
